div.head:
No. 431
Editorial Note
div.p: According to the United States Delegation Order of the Day (USDEL(OD) 14, February 6, 1954, CFM files, lot M 88, box 168) MacArthur, Merchant, Nash, Bohlen, Bowie, Freund, Davis, Rutter, and Manfull met at 9:45 a.m. in Secretary Dulles’ office to discuss Austria. No record of this meeting has been found in Department of State files.
According to the same Order of the Day, Secretary Dulles met in his office with Federal Minister of Justice Dehler at 10:30 a.m. No record of this meeting has been found in Department of State files.
This Order of the Day also states that there would be no United States Delegation meeting on February 6.
